Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Production systems I have designed and shipped across fintech, payments, and insurance.
Projects.aiEvolutionDescription: The same production engineering principles behind these projects — clear architecture, rigorous testing, and observability — are now being applied to AI agents, RAG pipelines, and evaluation frameworks.

crowdfunding-platform.name: Crowdfunding Platform
crowdfunding-platform.description: Full-featured investment crowdfunding platform with campaign management, investor dashboards, KYC flows, and real-time funding progress. Served thousands of active users in production.

parking-automation.name: Parking Automation System
parking-automation.description: IoT-integrated parking management system handling gate control, license plate recognition, payment processing, and occupancy tracking across multiple locations.

insurance-quoting-engine.name: Insurance Quoting Engine
insurance-quoting-engine.description: Remote engagement with a US-based insurance company. Built a dynamic quoting system with multi-step forms, risk calculations, and real-time premium estimation for end consumers.

banking-payroll.name: Banking & Payroll Systems
banking-payroll.description: Core banking modules for payroll disbursement, transaction reconciliation, and reporting. Built with Java and integrated with legacy banking infrastructure.

payment-gateway-crypto.name: Payment Gateway & Crypto E-commerce
payment-gateway-crypto.description: Custom payment gateway supporting fiat and cryptocurrency transactions. Integrated checkout flows, webhook-based settlement, and merchant dashboards.

Labs.title: AI Systems Lab
Labs.subtitle: Where I am building the next stage of my engineering practice — RAG systems, tool-based agents, MCP integrations, and evaluation harnesses. In progress.
Labs.demoPlaceholderDescription: This space will host an interactive {type} demo — chat UI, tool logs, or planning visualization.

rag-document-search.name: RAG Document Search
rag-document-search.description: A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with citation extraction. Query a knowledge base and inspect how chunks are ranked and referenced.

tool-calling-sandbox.name: Tool Calling Sandbox
tool-calling-sandbox.description: An agent that picks and executes tools through the Model Context Protocol. Inspect payloads, permissions, and return values in real time.

agent-eval-harness.name: Agent Evaluation Harness
agent-eval-harness.description: Run property-based tests and regression suites against agent outputs. Compare prompt versions and track quality metrics over time.

Principles.title: How I build systems
Principles.subtitle: Principles shaped by years of shipping production software.

0.title: Production-first mindset
0.description: Every feature is built for real users from day one. Performance, error handling, and edge cases are part of the first commit, not an afterthought.

1.title: Clear architecture over shortcuts
1.description: Well-defined boundaries between layers, explicit data flows, and readable code matter more than clever abstractions. Systems should be easy to reason about.

2.title: Communication as a technical skill
2.description: Documenting decisions, writing clear PRs, and explaining trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders is as important as writing the code itself.

3.title: Testing & maintainability
3.description: Automated tests, type safety, and CI pipelines catch regressions before they reach users. Code that cannot be tested confidently cannot be shipped confidently.

4.title: Evolving toward AI-driven systems
4.description: Applying the same rigor from production engineering to AI: grounded outputs, tool safety, evaluation suites, and cost-aware inference.

About.title: About
About.bio1: I'm Moises Escudero, a Software Engineer from Caracas, Venezuela, with a degree from Universidad Catolica Andres Bello. Over the past years I've built production systems across fintech, banking, insurance, crowdfunding, parking automation, and payment platforms — primarily with React, Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, MongoDB, Java, and Firebase.
About.bio2: I'm now channeling that production engineering background into AI systems. The same principles that keep financial platforms reliable — clear architecture, rigorous testing, observability, and explicit failure handling — apply directly to building trustworthy AI agents, RAG pipelines, and evaluation frameworks. This is not a pivot away from engineering; it's the next layer of it.

strengths.0: Pragmatic problem solving  delivering production systems in fintech, insurance, and payments.
strengths.1: Strong communication  explaining architecture decisions to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
strengths.2: Leadership & teamwork  coordinating cross-functional delivery in distributed teams.
strengths.3: Testing & maintainability  CI pipelines, type safety, and automated regression checks.
strengths.4: Systematic learner  applying production engineering rigor to AI agents, RAG, and evaluation.

fintech-to-ai-agents.title: From fintech frontends to AI agents: why the transition makes sense
fintech-to-ai-agents.excerpt: Production systems taught me reliability, testing, and architecture. Those same principles apply directly to building trustworthy AI agents.

eval-first-llm-dev.title: Evaluation-first development for LLM applications
eval-first-llm-dev.excerpt: Shipping a prompt without an eval suite is like deploying without tests. A practical framework for measuring agent quality.

mcp-tool-agents.title: What the Model Context Protocol means for tool-based agents
mcp-tool-agents.excerpt: MCP standardizes how agents discover and call tools. Notes on schema validation, auth scoping, and composability.

Contact.title: Get in touch
Contact.description: Based in Caracas, Venezuela. Open to remote opportunities across LATAM, the US, and Europe. Interested in working together or have a question? Drop me a message.
